summary: Hydrated live state shows the original cluster refs #45712, #58216, and #58988 are already closed, so no closure actions are valid for them. The representative #58216 has been replaced by hydrated open PR #73949, which is the current canonical path for the reconnect-exhausted stale-socket restart crash. Hydrated open PR #73989 is related but belongs to the separate reconnect-grace subfamily from #45712, so it should remain open outside this closeout.
